note: Recall ~0.88: the off-the-shelf method recovers ~88% of Glen's mapped lake area. Precision ~0.58: it also flags ~40% more water — meltwater channels and lake margins that Glen's lakes-only inventory excludes (channels are cataloged separately as 'Rivers'; slush adds negligible area here), compounded by the 2-day acquisition gap. As a total-water detector the result is broadly consistent with the published lakes; as a lakes-only classifier a single threshold with no shape/context filtering over-counts, exactly as expected.
